scripts.build:
esbuild src/main.js --bundle --outfile=dist/subtitle.plugin.js --minify --banner:js="/*
 * @name SubtitleCorrector
 * @description Real-time audio-gap subtitle sync with iOS 26 Liquid Glass UI
 * @version 3.2.0
 * @author Vedant
 */"
scripts.dev:
esbuild src/main.js --bundle --outfile=dist/subtitle.plugin.js --watch --banner:js="/*
 * @name SubtitleCorrector
 * @description Real-time audio-gap subtitle sync with iOS 26 Liquid Glass UI
 * @version 3.2.0
 * @author Vedant
 */"
